description: Writing exercises in which the student repeated the same phrase in Hebrew on the recto and Judaeo-Arabic on the verso. The instructor provided model handwriting at the top of each heading for the student to repeat. The heading lists the surname of the student as Bialobos, which is widely common in documents from the 18th and 19th centuries. The paleography and format of these writing exercises also match this timespan. MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
